item.title: DEBT: Surface stale bookmark errors instead of silently swallowing
item.intent: A silently swallowed bookmark error masks real permission problems — the user sees a generic failure instead of actionable guidance
item.description: BookmarkManager.resolveBookmark() catches stale bookmark errors with try? and silently continues. If the bookmark is truly stale (file moved or permissions revoked), the caller gets a URL that may fail on access with no indication of why. Surface the stale condition as a specific error or warning so the UI can prompt the user to re-pick the file.
acceptanceCriteria: Stale bookmark detection returns a specific .bookmarkStale error or warning
UI shows actionable guidance when a bookmark is stale (e.g., 're-open this file to restore access')
Recents list gracefully handles stale entries without crashing
